sectionHeading.title: Continuous learning in AI, security, and core computer science.
sectionHeading.description: A curated learning journey focused on AI, security, and fundamental computer science principles.

items.title: Privacy and Security in Online Social Media
items.note: Focused on security principles, privacy challenges, and safe practices in modern online platforms.

items.title: Build Generative AI Apps and Solutions with No-Code Tools
items.note: Learned to design and deploy AI-powered applications using no-code platforms and modern generative AI tools.

items.title: Master Generative AI & Tools
items.note: Explored generative AI concepts, tools, and real-world use cases for building intelligent applications.

items.title: Computational Theory: Language Principles & Finite Automata
items.note: Studied theoretical computer science concepts including automata, languages, and computation models.
